description: Update state files and run final verification. Update .agents/state/quant-autonomous-status.json to mark phases 12 and 13 complete, and append phase log entries to .agents/state/quant-phase-log.md with evidence of passing gates.
steps: Run the full quality gate suite: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, pnpm typecheck, pnpm build, pnpm test, pnpm lint, pnpm audit --audit-level=high. Capture results.

Update .agents/state/quant-autonomous-status.json: set current_phase to 'phase-13-complete', add 'phase-12' and 'phase-13' to completed_phases array, update last_updated timestamp, keep all gates as 'pass'.

Append to .agents/state/quant-phase-log.md: Add Phase 12 entry documenting what was added (fraud detection, ad billing, agent spending limits, disputes) with gate results. Add Phase 13 entry documenting what was added (abuse graph, spam detection, AI output safety, ad policy, bot detection, content labels, safety audit logs) with gate results.
Verify final state by running pnpm typecheck && pnpm test to confirm nothing is broken.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 quality gates pass (install, typecheck, build, test, lint, audit)
quant-autonomous-status.json shows phase-12 and phase-13 in completed_phases
quant-phase-log.md has entries for both phases with evidence
